summary:
Design a simplified Twitter where users can post tweets, follow and unfollow each other, and read a news feed of the most recent tweets.

Implement a Twitter class with: postTweet(userId, tweetId) to publish a tweet; getNewsFeed(userId) returning the ids of the 10 most recent tweets from the user and everyone they follow, ordered most recent first; follow(followerId, followeeId) to start following; and unfollow(followerId, followeeId) to stop. A user always sees their own tweets in their feed.

examples.input: Twitter(), postTweet(1, 5), getNewsFeed(1), follow(1, 2), postTweet(2, 6), getNewsFeed(1), unfollow(1, 2), getNewsFeed(1)
examples.explanation: User 1 first sees only their own tweet 5. After following user 2 and user 2 posting tweet 6, the feed is [6,5] with the newest first. After unfollowing user 2, user 1 again sees only [5].
The feed lists the user's own tweets newest first.

constraints: getNewsFeed returns at most the 10 most recent relevant tweet ids, newest first
At most 3 * 10^4 calls will be made across postTweet, getNewsFeed, follow, and unfollow
